name: Puyo! Push Brain
short_description: Puyo family challenges you to test your brain! Meet diverse Puyos and conquer tough levels. Top scorers earn a spot on the Brain Power Honor Roll. Aim for the #1!
detailed_description:
Follow Us

Welcome to the Puyo family! Here, you can meet many interesting people~ Come to the DISCORD channel and let's have fun together!

DISCORD【Liquid Meow Lite】：


About the Game

The Puyo family invites you to exercise your brain together. Conquer over 100 meticulously designed levels and showcase your exceptional mental prowess! Demonstrate your vigor and vitality!

[Diverse levels, fun experiences]

This game features over 100 levels for you to challenge, including puzzle box pushing, various mechanical transformations, block elimination, and special mechanisms for controlling multiple characters simultaneously.

Push boxes to clear a path, use blocks to fill in dark spaces, manipulate various mechanisms, and control multiple characters to work together towards the finish block.

[Diverse Themes, Unique Adventures]

Clearing specific levels unlocks skins and themes, with a total of 5 types available.

[An Adventure of Brainpower, Let's Climb to the Top]

Players with the most levels cleared can make it to the leaderboard. Completing all levels and finishing the mental workout will earn you the recognition of the Puyo family. (Of course, as long as you have the courage to try, the Puyo family will also appreciate you!)

Game Features

  • Unique gameplay that combines the novel puzzle-solving experience of box-pushing.

  • Over 100 game levels, providing you with hours of fun.

  • 5 different game skins.

  • Leave your name on the leaderboard.

  • Retro pixel art style.

Note: This game pays tribute to the classic puzzle games of the golden age of GAMEBOY handheld consoles.
